ModMetaData.name: VRE Android (HSK Patched)
ModMetaData.author: Oskar Potocki, Taranchuk, ISOREX, Sarg Bjornson — HSK patch by CarbineAction
ModMetaData.description:
HSK-patched standalone version of Vanilla Races Expanded — Android, tuned for the Hardcore SK modpack.
This bundles the upstream VRE Android mod content with HSK conventions baked in. Do NOT enable the Steam Workshop version of VRE Android alongside this — they would duplicate each other's defs.
HSK building rewrites (6 production/utility buildings): - All 6 buildings switched from fixed Steel/Gold to stuffCategories Metallic + costStuffCount (HSK convention — build from any metal) - Added the HSK class component pipeline (ElectronicComponents, Mechanism, Electronics, Microchips) per building tier: * VREA_AndroidStand — small storage furniture (minimal: stuff 50 + CompInd 1) * VREA_AndroidPartWorkbench — industrial fabrication (CompInd 8 + ElecComp 2 + Mech 2 + Electronics 2) * VREA_SubcorePolyanalyzer — ultratech analyzer (Plasteel 150 + CompSpacer 3 + ElecComp 2 + Microchips 2) * VREA_AndroidCreationStation — high-tech assembler (CompInd 6 + CompSpacer 6 + ElecComp 3 + Microchips 3) * VREA_AndroidBehavioristStation — software/programming bench (CompInd 4 + CompSpacer 4 + GoldBar 20 + ElecComp 2 + Microchips 2) * VREA_NeutroCasket — neutroamine storage (CompInd 3 + ElecComp 1 + Mech 1)
HSK material conversion on android body parts (15 craftable items, 3 needed swaps): - VREA_MetabolismRegulator: Gold 1 → GoldBar 1 - VREA_ArtificialSpine: Gold 1 → GoldBar 1 - VREA_Reactor: Uranium 20 → DepletedUranium 20 - 12 other body parts already used HSK-native Plasteel + ComponentSpacer/Industrial — no changes needed
No CE work needed — androids do not have natural melee weapons (their capability comes from installed bionic-class artificial body parts which are stat hediffs, not Verb-givers).
Original mod by Oskar Potocki, Taranchuk, ISOREX, Sarg Bjornson. HSK patches and bundling by CarbineAction.
Required: Hardcore SK, Combat Extended, Vanilla Expanded Framework, Biotech DLC. Ideology DLC patches load conditionally.
